message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Ausbildungs- und Studienverhalten von Abiturienten in Bayern 1973","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0113","justification":"Survey of Bavarian high school graduates’ educational and study behavior in 1973, directly addressing higher/further education decisions in Bavaria in the 1970s."},{"title":"Studienberechtigte 1976 in Bayern: Ausbildung und Studium","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0114","justification":"Dataset on school leavers with university entrance qualification in Bavaria in 1976, focusing on training and study, i.e., higher and further education pathways."},{"title":"Studienberechtigte 1970 in Bayern: Bildungs- und Berufsverlauf","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0112","justification":"Follows Bavarian graduates with university entrance qualification from 1970 and analyzes their educational and occupational trajectories, including higher education participation."},{"title":"Studienanfänger in Bayern 1974/75","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0115","justification":"Contains information about first-year students in Bavaria in the academic year 1974/75, covering study fields and access to higher education."},{"title":"Hochschulzugang und Studienwahl in Bayern 1971","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0111","justification":"Focuses on university access and study choice among Bavarian cohorts around 1971, explicitly about higher education in Bavaria in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Soziale Herkunft und Studienchancen in Bayern 1970er Jahre","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0116","justification":"Analyzes social background and chances of entering higher education among Bavarian youths during the 1970s, directly relevant to higher/further education."},{"title":"Weiterbildung und Zweitausbildung in Bayern 1978","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0117","justification":"Survey on continuing education and second-chance education in Bavaria in 1978, focused on further/continuing education in the 1970s."},{"title":"Studienbedingungen an bayerischen Hochschulen 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0118","justification":"Examines study conditions at Bavarian higher education institutions in 1975, directly about higher education in Bavaria mid‑1970s."},{"title":"Berufs- und Studienorientierung bayerischer Schüler 1972","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0119","justification":"Looks at how Bavarian pupils in 1972 orient themselves toward occupations and tertiary studies, relating to transitions into higher/further education."},{"title":"Regionale Bildungsbeteiligung in Bayern: Hochschulen und Fachschulen 1970–1979","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0120","justification":"Dataset on regional participation in universities and vocational colleges in Bavaria throughout the 1970s, covering both higher and further education."}]}
